stories.storyTitle: Your car broke down on a deserted desert road. Hours later, a strange man appears in an old truck and offers you a ride.
He starts talking about "Shadow Gates", saying he knows a shortcut that leads to a purer world.
After a while, you find yourself facing your future self, who says you will regret your choices.
stories.choice2: Refuse and try to go back.

stories.storyTitle: The man leaves you in front of a strange cave and says: "Enter, the truth awaits you inside."
stories.choice2: Refuse and try to go back.

stories.storyTitle: You find yourself in an endless desert. Time is frozen, and everyone you see looks like you. You begin to lose your identity.
You discover an underground city. The air is thick, and the sounds resemble your voice. You feel watched.
You try to go back, but the path has disappeared. Everything around you turns into infinite darkness.
In the heart of the city, you find a temple full of statues that look like you. One of them opens its eyes suddenly.
By touching the statue, you enter it. You watch your life repeat endlessly, unable to speak.
The statues shatter, revealing a bright room containing a gateway machine with a book beside it.
The book describes all your decisions precisely, ending with: "The truth is not here... it is within you."
By tearing the book, the ground collapses and you fall into an infinite vortex. Everything you were is erased.
You activate the machine and transfer to a beautiful, peaceful world. The sun rises, and people smile at you.
After a while, you realize everything is fake. People never change, and time is frozen. You have entered an intelligent prison.
You remember everything that happened before. You return to the temple and place your hand on the last statue. You say: "I am not the one who wants to leave... I am the one who must be erased."
